Rule.name: six_generic_query
Rule.Description: The Swiss Army knife of the IIQ operator

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the query executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: className
Argument.Description: Sailpoint object class to query. 'ResourceObject' requests reading data directly from endpoints, 'Expression' performs an OrionQL query and 'Rule: name' reads output from a rule.

Argument.name: filter
Argument.Description: Sailpoint filter expression template for database queries, and for expression queries an OrionQL expression. For reading data from endpoints a specification of the form application: schemaObjectType, optionally followed by application parameter overrides, one per line, as name=expression using OrionQL. For rule execution, parameter specifications, one per line, as name=expression using OrionQL.

Argument.name: ordering
Argument.Description: Comma separated list of attributes to sort the result set of database queries. Append " desc" to an attribute for reverse ordering.

Argument.name: subquery
Argument.Description: OrionQL expression returning a child collection

Argument.name: computations
Argument.Description: OrionQL attribute assignment expressions and/or CerberusLogic attribute computation rules. Multiple blocks will be evaluated in separate passes.

Argument.name: output
Argument.Description: Column specifications for tabular output or a single expression or formatting template for grouping objects, empty for counting objects

Argument.name: grouping
Argument.Description: OrionQL expressions to group or count objects by

Argument.name: postprocessing
Argument.Description: Grouping level specific CerberusLogic rules to accept and/or transform elements

Argument.name: layout
Argument.type: choice:,Matrix,Matrix (rotate headers),Multiple matrices,Multiple matrices (rotate headers),Multiple tables
Argument.Description: Choose the representation for the grouping result

Argument.name: maxRows
Argument.Description: Maximum number of objects to process

Argument.name: maxCache
Argument.Description: Free memory after processing the specified number of primary objects

Argument.name: download
Argument.Description: Request to receive the output as download in the indicated format

Argument.name: runInBackground
Argument.Description: Enable for long-running queries to get the result sent by email
